name: mmm-theme
description: Custom Ghost theme for Morigaon Mahila Mehfil (MMM) NGO

logo.description: Logo for the navbar & footer (falls back to Settings -> General logo)

hero_subtext.default: For over four decades, Morigaon Mahila Mehfil has stood beside the women and children of Assam - through health, education, livelihood, women's rights and disaster response.

about_media_url.description: About page media - paste a YouTube URL (shows as video) or an image URL

footer_tagline.default: Empowering the women and children of Morigaon, Assam with dignity, opportunity and hope since 1979.

footer_reg_line.default: Reg. No-126 of 1980-81 (Societies Act XXI of 1860) · 12A · 80G · FCRA

contact_address_main.default: Morigaon Civil Hospital Road, Ward No. 7, PO: Morigaon, Dist. Morigaon, Assam - 782105
